_comment: Add a _ before an option name to comment it out and it wont be added to the apworld
Using 'goal' as the name of an option let you override some of the generated goal parameters
goal.description: How to End your Randomized playthrough.

_filler_traps._comment: Using values here let you set a 'recommended' filler_trap percentage or even a default percentage

description: Vanilla Goal
Defeat Dracula and complete the whole main questline.
For a Shorter Game
Defeat the Bandit King in Act 1 to win!
For a Medium-long Game
Defeat the Militia Captain in Act 2 to win!
For a somewhat long Game
Defeat the Cursed Smith in Act 3 to win!
For a long game
You don't need to complete the main quest, just defeat all the V Bloods to goal.
When enabled Act 2 Items, V-Bloods and Spells will be included in the Multiworld.
When enabled Act 3 Items, V-Bloods and Spells will be included in the Multiworld.
Requires Act 2 to be enabled.
When enabled Act 4 Items, V-Bloods and Spells will be included in the Multiworld.
Requires Act 3 to be enabled.
This option will make the logic force you to defeat every V Blood in their row before you're able to tackle the next.
Expect a lot of Exploration to be in logic!
This option adds 6 extra progression items called 'Blood Magic', 'Chaos Magic', 'Unholy Magic', 'Illusion Magic', 'Frost Magic' and 'Storm Magic'.
You're not allowed to use magic from that particular school until you obtain these.
When this option is enabled, you are required to receive at least one of these before tackling Quincey the Bandit King.
Adds the various fish as extra locations and as filler items.
You'll require to have defeated 'Finn the Fisherman' before any of the checks are in logic.
Adds all the Items you receive from a Knowledge Stations into the pool of items and as extra checks.
These Items which are labeled as 'Structures' and 'Consumables' ingame.
Adds extra checks for learning all of the spells in the same Spell School.
Adds a few extra locations as shopping locations.
Adds all of the Steam Achievements excluding Brutal Difficulty as extra locations.
Adds multiple items called 'Lost Souls' into the multiworld, you have to gather them all to goal.
An extra location will be added to each V-Blood called their soul slot to accommodate the added items.
